text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The environment around me is vibrant and modern, filled with glowing blues and structured lines, reflecting intentional design and innovation. As I move further inside and see the R+D wall, I am gripped by a philosophical wonder about the interplay between human creativity and technology—a space dedicated to research and development, to the endless questioning and pursuit of knowledge. I feel at home among ideas, and slightly amused at the juxtaposition of human presence and technological artifacts, each inviting contemplation.
